candidate.name: github-issue-workflow-mcp
candidate.description: A cached MCP-style candidate for reading GitHub issues and coordinating code changes.
candidate.installation: Configure a GitHub token and register the MCP server manually.
evidence: Demo cache entry highlights GitHub access and repository permissions.

risk_reasons: 候选涉及仓库写入权限，需要人工确认后再启用。
候选需要连接外部服务，可能涉及账号或 token。
evaluations.reason: 占位评分：基于能力关键词重合、扩展类型一致性和权限风险生成。
